name: American Express Gold Card
exclusions: fuel payments do not earn Membership Rewards points effective 12 June 2025
excluded spends as per American Express terms
milestoneBenefits: 1,000 bonus Membership Rewards points on completing 6 transactions of Rs 1,000 or more every calendar month
5,000 Membership Rewards points on first-year card renewal after payment of annual membership fee
additionalBenefits: Welcome gift of 4,000 Membership Rewards points on payment of annual fee and spending Rs 10,000 within 90 days
1 Membership Rewards point for every Rs 50 spent on eligible categories
Utility spends earn 1 Membership Rewards point per Rs 50, capped at 10,000 Membership Rewards points in a calendar month
5X Membership Rewards points through Reward Multiplier
No pre-set spending limit, subject to American Express policies
Dining offers at select partner restaurants

salaried: Eligibility is subject to American Express charge card approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to American Express charge card approval criteria
